pages.text: A piece of a $(bold)bastion remnant$() set adrift — a blackstone ruin of gold and $(item)gilded blackstone$() around a $(item)lodestone$() treasure plinth, with bastion loot and a caged $(item)magma cube$() spawner. Piglins and a brute hold it; tread carefully, or barter your way past in gold.
Nether-native — it fizzles if thrown anywhere else. Crafted from blackstone, gold and $(item)crying obsidian$().
